message:
Version 2.2.0 - Release Notes
YouTube Downloader Plus
Developed by Sujan Rai | Made in Nepal
================================================

We are pleased to announce the release of YouTube Downloader Plus v2.2.0. This version introduces major new capabilities, improved playback control, and important bug fixes to enhance overall stability and usability.

MAJOR FEATURES
------------------------------------------------

1. Channel & Playlist Support (Flagship Feature)
   - Search for channels and playlists directly from the search dialog.
   - Use the filter box to refine results by channels or playlists.
   - Browse and load all videos from selected channels or playlists.
   - Download entire channels or playlists in MP4, M4A, or MP3 format.
   - Perform actions like Copy, Download, and Open on Web directly from the panel.
   - Add channels or playlists to Favorites for quick and easy access later.
   - Full video management support within channels and playlists, just like individual video results.

2. Enhanced Playback Controls
   - Press "C" to instantly hear the current playback time.
   - New seek slider for easier navigation through media.
   - Volume slider added for improved control using mouse.

3. Loop Section Feature
   - Press "[" to mark the start of a loop section.
   - Press "]" to mark the end of the loop.
   - Press "L" to enable looping between marked points.
   - Press "L" again anytime to disable looping.
   - Note: End position must be set after the start position.

NEW TOOL
------------------------------------------------

1. Webpage Text Extractor
   - Extract clean, readable text from any public webpage URL.
   - Automatically formats content for easy reading.
   - Output is ready to copy or export for further use.
   - Useful for articles, blogs, and documentation reading.

BUG FIXES & IMPROVEMENTS
------------------------------------------------

- Fixed multiple issues related to playback stability.
- Improved download reliability and conversion handling.
- Resolved navigation-related bugs across the application.
- General performance improvements and UI refinements.

================================================

We hope this update significantly enhances your experience.

Your feedback is always welcome.
Join our community to stay updated, share feedback, and access pre-releases:
https://t.me/blindtechvisionary

Thank you for using YouTube Downloader Plus.
